title: Solar module array and method of assembling a solar module array
abstract: A solar module array (100) is provided, wherein the solar module array comprises a purlin (101, 102, 103) and a solar module element (109) comprising four mounting areas, wherein the solar module element (109) is mounted to the purlin (101, 102, 103) at two diagonally arranged mounting areas of the four mounting areas.
claims:
Claims C l a i m s 1. A solar module array comprising : a purlin; and a solar module element comprising four mounting areas, wherein the solar module element is mounted to the purlin at two diagonally arranged mounting areas of the four mounting areas. 2. The solar module array according to claim 1, further comprising a rod, wherein the solar module element is mounted to the rod at another one of the four mounting areas. 3. The solar module array according to claim 2, wherein the rod and the purlin define an angle having a value less than 90Â°. 4. The solar module array according to any one of the claims 2 to 3, comprises a plurality of purlins and a plurality of solar module elements, wherein the rod is mounted to only one purlin. 5. The solar module array according to any one of the claims 2 to 4, wherein the rod is pivotably mounted to the purlin. 6. The solar module array according to any one of the claims 2 to 4, wherein the rod is fixedly mounted to the purlin. 7. The solar module array according to any one of the claims 1 to 6, wherein the mounting structure comprises a plurality of parallel purlins and a plurality of rods. 8. The solar module array according to claim 7, further comprises a plurality of solar module elements, wherein the solar module elements 

 are mounted to the plurality of purlins and the plurality of rods. 9. The solar module array according to any one of the claims 1 to 8, wherein adjacent solar module elements may be connected to each other. 10. The solar module array according to any one of the claims 2 to 9, wherein the rod forms a zig-zag line. 11. The solar module array according to any one of the claims 1 to 10, wherein the purlin forms a zig-zag line. 12. A method of assembling a solar module array, the method comprising : providing a purlin; mounting a solar module element having four mounting areas onto the purlin in such a way that the purlin is mounted at two diagonally arranged mounting areas of the four mounting areas. 13. The method according to claim 12, further comprising : providing a rod; mounting the solar module element to the rod at another one of the four mounting areas.
